# Scope Baseline

## Purpose
Provide the approved scope statement, WBS, and WBS dictionary as a single controlled baseline.

## Audience
Project Manager, PMO, Sponsors, Delivery Leads.

## Inputs
- Project charter (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/project-charter.md`).
- WBS (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/wbs.yaml`).
- WBS dictionary (attach or link below).

## 1. Approved Scope Statement
Summarize the agreed deliverables, exclusions, and acceptance criteria.

## 2. Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)
Link to the approved WBS and include a snapshot or appendix reference.

## 3. WBS Dictionary
Provide definitions, boundaries, and acceptance criteria for each work package.

## 4. Baseline Maintenance
- Record baseline approval date and governance authority.
- Update only through approved change requests.
- Track baseline version history in the change log (`docs/templates/shared/change-log.md`).

## 5. Scope Change Tracking
| Change ID | Description | Impacted WBS Element | Approval Date | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Scope statement approved and dated.
- [ ] WBS and dictionary attached or linked.
- [ ] Baseline change control procedure documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Scope baseline reflects the latest approved scope.
- Changes are traceable to approved change requests.
